item.powercaeds.totem_card.desc: Passively saves you from lethal damage, then goes on a 5 minute cooldown.
item.powercaeds.dash_card.desc: Dash 10 blocks in the direction you are looking. Grants Slow Falling for 3s.
item.powercaeds.midas_card.desc: Passively turns your items and blocks beneath you into gold. Increases your size.
item.powercaeds.skeleton_card.desc: Shoots a strong arrow in your aim direction.
item.powercaeds.ghast_card.desc: Launches an empowered fireball in your aim direction.
item.powercaeds.ancient_card.desc: Fires a 15-block magic beam that damages and slows enemies.
item.powercaeds.glock_card.desc: 8 charges. Fires a hitscan shot for 4 damage. Empty magazine triggers 30s cooldown.
item.powercaeds.nova_card.desc: Creates paired portals; entering the first teleports you to the second.
